content:
Can I bring a minor to visit someone in jail?" 
"Are there certain hours for jail visitation?"
"How do I check if an inmate is available for a visit?"
"I've never visited a jail before, what should I expect?"
"Can I bring gifts for the inmate during jail visitation?"
"What types of identification do I need to bring for a jail visit?"
"How long can I stay during a jail visit?"
"Is an appointment needed to visit an inmate?"
"What is the dress code for visiting someone in jail?"
"Do I need a lawyer's permission to visit someone in jail?"
"What's the protocol if an inmate is transferred to a different jail, can I still visit?"
"Is there any support system in place for first-time visitors?"
"Can an inmate refuse visitors?"
"Can I visit someone in jail even if I'm not a family member?"
"How does a video visitation work, in jails where personal visitation is not allowed?"
"What happens if I miss my scheduled visit?"
"Are there programs that support families of incarcerated individuals?"
"Are inmates allowed to choose their visitors?
